'''lolangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobated|lobated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobated|lobated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lolangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolangithi|lolangithi]] || [[word:lolangiji|lolangiji]] || [[word:lolangishi|lolangishi]] || [[word:lolangiki|lolangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolanguthuthu|lolanguthuthu]] || [[word:lolangujuju|lolangujuju]] || [[word:lolangushushu|lolangushushu]] || [[word:lolangukuku|lolangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolanguthu|lolanguthu]] || [[word:lolanguju|lolanguju]] || [[word:lolangushu|lolangushu]] || [[word:lolanguku|lolanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolangufthuf|lolangufthuf]] || [[word:lolangufjuf|lolangufjuf]] || [[word:lolangufshuf|lolangufshuf]] || [[word:lolangufkuf|lolangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolangethe|lolangethe]] || [[word:lolangeje|lolangeje]] || [[word:lolangeshe|lolangeshe]] || [[word:lolangeke|lolangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolangothotho|lolangothotho]] || [[word:lolangojojo|lolangojojo]] || [[word:lolangoshosho|lolangoshosho]] || [[word:lolangokoko|lolangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolangotho|lolangotho]] || [[word:lolangojo|lolangojo]] || [[word:lolangosho|lolangosho]] || [[word:lolangoko|lolangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolangofthof|lolangofthof]] || [[word:lolangofjof|lolangofjof]] || [[word:lolangofshof|lolangofshof]] || [[word:lolangofkof|lolangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfthĂŻf|lolangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfjĂŻf|lolangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfshĂŻf|lolangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfkĂŻf|lolangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lolangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lolangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lolangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lolangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfthĂŻf|lolangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfjĂŻf|lolangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfshĂŻf|lolangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfkĂŻf|lolangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfthĂŻf|lolangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfjĂŻf|lolangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfshĂŻf|lolangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lolangĂŻfkĂŻf|lolangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lolangĂŠthĂŠ|lolangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lolangĂŠjĂŠ|lolangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lolangĂŠshĂŠ|lolangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lolangĂŠkĂŠ|lolangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lolangathatha|lolangathatha]] || [[word:lolangajaja|lolangajaja]] || [[word:lolangashasha|lolangashasha]] || [[word:lolangakaka|lolangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lolangatha|lolangatha]] || [[word:lolangaja|lolangaja]] || [[word:lolangasha|lolangasha]] || [[word:lolangaka|lolangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lolangafthaf|lolangafthaf]] || [[word:lolangafjaf|lolangafjaf]] || [[word:lolangafshaf|lolangafshaf]] || [[word:lolangafkaf|lolangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lolangasha|lolangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolangshĂ«sha|lolangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolangrosha|lolangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolangmusha|lolangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolangyasha|lolangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololangnkshĂ«sha|gololangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololangnkrosha|gololangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololangnkmusha|gololangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololangnkyasha|gololangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lolalangasha|lolalangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolalangshĂ«sha|lolalangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolalangrosha|lolalangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolalangmusha|lolalangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolalangyasha|lolalangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololalangnkshĂ«sha|gololalangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololalangnkrosha|gololalangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololalangnkmusha|gololalangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololalangnkyasha|gololalangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lelĂŠngasha|lelĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lelĂŠngshĂ«sha|lelĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lelĂŠngrosha|lelĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lelĂŠngmusha|lelĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lelĂŠngyasha|lelĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golelĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|golelĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golelĂŠngnkrosha|golelĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golelĂŠngnkmusha|golelĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golelĂŠngnkyasha|golelĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lolfangasha|lolfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lolfangshĂ«sha|lolfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lolfangrosha|lolfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lolfangmusha|lolfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lolfangyasha|lolfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gololfangnkshĂ«sha|gololfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gololfangnkrosha|gololfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gololfangnkmusha|gololfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gololfangnkyasha|gololfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
